title: MEP Project Manager – Commercial Fit-Out (Contract, Inside IR35)
description_raw:
Turner & Townsend are looking for a contract MEP Project Manager to join a high-profile commercial office fit-out programme in the City of London. This assignment is inside IR35; engagement via an approved umbrella company is required.

The programme comprises full Category A and B fit-out across three floors of a Grade-A office building, with a significant MEP scope including:
- Low and medium voltage (LV/MV) distribution
- Chilled water and heating systems (4-pipe fan coil units)
- BMS controls integration
- Mechanical ventilation and AC
- Domestic hot and cold water services, drainage
- Fire detection and suppression

Your accountabilities:
- Single point of responsibility for MEP package delivery (design, procurement, installation, commissioning, handover)
- Manage BREEAM and WELL Building Standard compliance for M&E works
- Administer JCT Design and Build sub-contracts for MEP works packages
- Coordinate with structural, façade, interior design and IT/AV workstreams
- Produce weekly progress reports and attend employer’s agent meetings

Candidate profile:
- Mechanical or electrical engineering degree or HND/HNC + 15 years’ experience
- Minimum 7 years’ MEP project management on Category A/B commercial fit-out in London
- CIBSE or IMechE membership beneficial
- SMSTS and First Aid required; Black CSCS

Rate: £550 per day (inside IR35 — umbrella company required)
Start: immediate start available / 2-week notice acceptable
Duration: 8 months
Location: City of London; site-based 5 days per week
